done_claim_rule: A workstream may be marked done only after scripts/validate_bootstrap_tracker.py verifies every required artifact and named check. Prose evidence alone is insufficient.

orders.title: Tracker and hermetic contract
evidence: python scripts/run_test_tier.py hermetic passes with committed fixtures and standard-library tests.
python scripts/validate_bootstrap_tracker.py verifies every B0.1 required artifact and done claim.
GitHub Actions is configured to run the hermetic tier and tracker validator on push and pull_request.

orders.title: Shared infrastructure skeleton
evidence: lib/ contains only hypothesis-independent environment, IO, timestamp, provenance, guardrail, report, and search-log modules.
python scripts/run_test_tier.py hermetic passes the shared-infrastructure unit tests.
python scripts/audit_new_script_lib_usage.py reports zero unregistered scripts, zero lib bypasses, and zero copied shared helpers.

orders.title: Golden-number statistics anchors
evidence: lib/statistics.py implements dependency-free Sharpe, autocorrelation, PSR, DSR, dual-MinTRL, Newey-West, and independent-bet primitives with explicit conventions.

tests/fixtures/statistics_golden.json binds published-method inputs, expected values, local wiki source paths, and an offline SciPy 1.17.1 cross-check; the hermetic golden tests pass without SciPy at runtime.
docs/STATISTICS_CONVENTIONS.md records source SHA-256 hashes, raw-kurtosis and lag conventions, limitations, and separate effective-observation reporting requirements.

orders.title: Registry, evidence tiers, and locked gates
evidence: schemas/hypothesis_registry.schema.json and scripts/validate_hypothesis_registry.py enforce the Lily registry contract and block validated status without E2 or E3 evidence.
scripts/validate_evidence_tiers.py blocks acceptance or edge claims below E2 and requires an independent completed adversarial review with no unresolved critical issue at E2 or E3.

experiments/locked_gates.jsonl starts empty by design; scripts/validate_locked_gates.py and hermetic tests enforce append-only history, active hashes, human approval, reviewer identity, and replacement hashes for future supersession.
.gitattributes pins hash-bound files to LF and the hermetic governance tests pass.

orders.title: Backup and restore
evidence: A fresh remote clone was detached at commit 12fd1ceffaae4824fccbe93470af39df20ca60a2; the hash matched, 51 hermetic tests passed, the bootstrap tracker passed, and the restored worktree was clean.
The rehearsal confirmed that config/machine.json and repository data are absent by design, verified all six wiki-relative methodology hashes, and removed the temporary clone.

docs/BACKUP_AND_RESTORE.md separates committed artifacts, untracked machine state, the external LLM Wiki, credentials, and future data; external data restore remains explicitly pending because no Lily data exists.

orders.title: Data layer design and fixtures
evidence: docs/DATA_ACQUISITION_DECISION_TREE.md and docs/DATA_INTEGRITY_AND_SURVIVORSHIP_POLICY.md define named-gap acquisition, raw/normalized/derived boundaries, dual/container hashes, provider drift, ETF survivorship/currency/corporate actions, and individual-contract versus continuous-futures roll controls.
datasets/registry.json records zero network acquisition and zero paid spend while defining versioned layer and hash policies; no real dataset is claimed.

Five provider-boundary schemas and five committed synthetic fixtures cover daily bars, active and delisted instruments, point-in-time membership, expired futures contracts, and an explicit continuous-series roll.
scripts/validate_data_layer.py passes with zero network and paid-data use; 60 hermetic tests pass and the state-audit tier skips loudly with missing LILY_DATA_ROOT when local state is absent.

orders.title: L-0 sizing feasibility study
evidence: The hash-bound preregistration and validator remain unchanged and scripts/validate_l_0_sizing_feasibility_preregistration.py passes.

The deterministic E0 report classifies all six capital/broker combinations as scope_restricted: 8- and 10-sleeve ETF economic sizing passes, but no exact broker path is fully verified; 12 sleeves fail the locked 25% notional-weight cap.

The locked futures formula produces micro minimum capital of USD 40,600, USD 54,200, and USD 95,400 and full-size comparator capital of USD 405,900, USD 541,200, and USD 1,614,600 for 4, 8, and 12 markets.
scripts/validate_l_0_sizing_feasibility_report.py verifies the calculation, report digest, JSON/Markdown agreement, E0/no-edge boundaries, and broker/futures scenario coverage.

orders.title: L-1 baseline preregistration
forbidden: L-1 execution in the preregistration session
evidence: experiments/l_1_baseline_preregistration.json locks the raw 60-day directional-count formula, zero and missing-return handling, one-session execution delay, separate signed-research and current-capital long/cash branches, weekly sizing, costs, benchmarks, return accounting, regimes, payoff tests, and fixed search inventory before any L-1 measurement.

Dual MinTRL is recalculated by the validator: falsification requires 3,850 joint independent-bet equivalents before validation is considered; validation is bound by 8,673 and the untouched 2016-01-04 through 2026-06-30 window remains sealed behind the sequential unlock rule.

experiments/locked_gates.jsonl appends active gate l_1_baseline_v1 with SHA-256 91527c2f4ec00134767df86849f36b9876b00eb44cd56dc01650d33bf938fe29 for the preregistration and c568f5db8236e253e63056ed2797ead9259397d293c478e7f0abf53bfda70232 for its validator.
scripts/validate_l_1_baseline_preregistration.py and hermetic tamper tests pass; no L-1 strategy code, market data, return result, broker request, or backtest was created in B3.
